query:
SELECT gameDate, COUNT(*) as cnt, 
  SUM(CASE WHEN awayBookSpread IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_spread,
  SUM(CASE WHEN bookTotal IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_total,
  MIN(gameDate) as min_date,
  MAX(gameDate) as max_date
FROM games
WHERE sport = 'NCAAM'
  AND (awayBookSpread IS NOT NULL OR bookTotal IS NOT NULL)
GROUP BY gameDate
ORDER BY gameDate DESC
LIMIT 20;
